Data Sources and Citations

data_sources.Rmd

🇺🇳 | UN

UNWPP1

Dataset: Historical population estimates
Dataset name: WPP2022_Population1JanuaryBySingleAgeSex_Medium_1950-2021
Accessed via: Webpage
Last accessed: 30/08/2023 Data range: 1950-2021

Dataset: Future population projections
Dataset name: WPP2022_Population1JanuaryBySingleAgeSex_Medium_2022-2100
Accessed via: Webpage
Last accessed: 30/08/2023 Data range: 2022-2100

UNWUP2

Dataset: Urban population estimates
Dataset name: WUP2018-F02-Proportion_Urban
Accessed via: Webpage
Last accessed: 30/08/2023

👥 | WorldPop

Population spatial distribution3

Dataset: Individual countries 2015-2030 ( 1km resolution ) R2025A v1
Dataset name: G2_CN_POP_R25A_1km
Accessed via: API
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2015-2030 (2015-2026 used)

🌍 | MAP

Prevalence estimates4

Dataset: Plasmodium falciparum prevalence in 2 to 10 year olds
Dataset name: Malaria_202508_Global_Pf_Parasite_Rate
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2000-2024

Dataset: Plasmodium vivax prevalence in 1 to 99 year olds
Dataset name: Malaria__202508_Global_Pv_Parasite_Rate
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2000-2024

Intervention coverage estimates4

Dataset: ITN use in Africa
Dataset name: Interventions__202508_Africa_Insecticide_Treated_Net_Use
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2000-2024

Dataset: IRS coverage in Africa
Dataset name: Interventions__202508_Africa_IRS_Coverage
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2000-2024

Dataset: Effective treatment coverage
Dataset name: Interventions__202508_Global_Antimalarial_Effective_Treatment
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2000-2024

Access and travel time4

Dataset: Travel time to cities Dataset name: 201501_Global_Travel_Time_to_Cities_2015
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 30/11/2023 Data range: 2015

Dataset: Motorised travel time to healthcare Dataset name: 202001_Global_Motorized_Travel_Time_to_Healthcare_2019
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 30/11/2023 Data range: 2019

Dataset: Walking travel time to healthcare Dataset name: 202001_Global_Walking_Only_Travel_Time_To_Healthcare_2019
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 30/11/2023 Data range: 2019

Blood disorders4

Dataset: HbC Allele frequency Dataset name: 201201_Africa_HbC_Allele_Frequency_2010
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 30/11/2023 Data range: 2010

Dataset: Duffy negativity phenotype frequency Dataset name: 201201_Global_Duffy_Negativity_Phenotype_Frequency_2010
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 30/11/2023 Data range: 2010

Dataset: G6PD Allele frequency Dataset name: 201201_Global_G6PDd_Allele_Frequency_2010
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 30/11/2023 Data range: 2010

Dataset: HbS Allele frequency Dataset name: 201201_Global_Sickle_Haemoglobin_HbS_Allele_Frequency_2010
Accessed via: R-package
Last accessed: 30/11/2023 Data range: 2010

☔️ | CHIRPS

Rainfall estimates5

Dataset: CHIRPS: rainfall estimates from rain gauge and satellite observations Dataset name: Monthly global raster dataset
Accessed via: Website
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2000:2025

⚕️ | WHO

Burden6

Dataset: Cases and deaths Dataset name: Annex 4h
Accessed via: Website
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2022-2024

Intervention commodities

Dataset: Commodities distribution and coverage Dataset name: Annex 4g
Accessed via: Website
Last accessed: 06/01/2026 Data range: 2022-2024

MVIP7

Dataset: MVIP vaccine trial Dataset name: WHO_Malaria_Vaccine_Implementation_Program_Briefing_2021
Accessed via: Online report
Last accessed: 01/10/2022

Vaccine dashboard8

Dataset: Malaria vaccine introduction status
Dataset name: Malaria vaccine introduction status
Accessed via: Online dashboard
Last accessed: 06/01/2026

MagicAPP9

Dataset: WHO malaria guidelines
Dataset name: MAGICapp Accessed via: Online resource
Last accessed: 06/01/2026

🦟 | Vectors

Vector relative abundance10

Dataset: Relative abundance of malaria vectors
Dataset name: Modelling the relative abundance of the primary African vectors of malaria before and after the implementation of indoor, insecticide-based vector control
Accessed via: Website/Paper Last accessed: 06/01/2026

Vector occurrence11

Dataset: Dominant malaria vectors
Dataset name: A global map of dominant malaria vectors Accessed via: Website/Paper Last accessed: 06/01/2026

Vector bionomics

Dataset: Vector bionomics Dataset name: A review of malaria vector bionomics Accessed via: Personal correspondence with Arran Hamlet
Last accessed: 30/08/2023

Pyrethroid resistance

Dataset: Pyrethroid resistance Dataset name: Country level historical and future pyrethroid resistance projections
Accessed via: Personal correspondence with Thom Churcher
Last accessed: 30/08/2023

Vector control parameters12 13

Dataset: Vector control efficacy parameters
Dataset name: ITN and IRS efficacy parameters for multiple products in the presence of resistance
Accessed via: Papers
Last accessed: 30/08/2023

Net type14

Dataset: Bed net product introduction dates
Dataset name: itn-dashboards/mass-campaign-tracker/?_sfm_mc_date_of_import=20221201
Accessed via: Webpage
Last accessed: 04/01/2024

Net retention15

Dataset: Bed net retention half-life Dataset name: Bed net retention half-life Accessed via: Paper
Last accessed: 05/03/2024

📍 | GADM

Spatial boundaries16

Dataset: Country and sub-national spatial boundaries
Dataset name: GADM version 4.1.0
Accessed via: Website
Last accessed: 22/11/2023

📋 | DHS

Proportion ACT17

Dataset: ACT use
Dataset name: Children who took any ACT (ID: ML_AMLD_C_ACT)
Accessed via: Website/StatCompiler
Last accessed: 19/07/2022

Proportion public17

Dataset: Public sector treatment coverage
Dataset name: Children with fever for whom advice or treatment was sought, the source was a public sector facility (ID: ML_FEVA_C_PUB)
Accessed via: Website/StatCompiler
Last accessed: 19/07/2022

💊 | SMC

SMC coverage18 19

Dataset: SMC implementation areas
Dataset name: SMC implementation areas
Accessed via: Website/Grey literature
Last accessed: 10/01/2025

🧑‍🧒‍🧒 | UNICEF

Vaccine deliveries20

Dataset: Malaria vaccine deliveries
Dataset name: Malaria vaccine deliveries
Accessed via: Website/dashboard
Last accessed: 06/01/2026

Citations

1.
United Nations. World population prospects.
2.
United Nations. World urbanization prospects.
3.
Bondarenko, M. et al. Constrained estimates of 2015–2030 total number of people per grid square at a resolution of 3 arc seconds (approximately 100 m at the equator), R2025A version v1. (2025) doi:10.5258/SOTON/WP00839.
4.
Pfeffer, D. et al. malariaAtlas: An r interface to global malariometric data hosted by the malaria atlas project. Malaria Journal 17, 352 (2018).
5.
Climate Hazards Center. CHIRPS version 3.0: Monthly global raster data. (2024).
6.
World Health Organization. World malaria report. (2025).
7.
World Health Organization. MVIP briefing.
8.
World Health Organization. Malaria vaccine introduction dashboard. https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiZmZjN2RkOGYtYzM4NS00MWYxLThhYmMtYzg3YjMwYjU2ZDA4IiwidCI6ImY2MTBjMGI3LWJkMjQtNGIzOS04MTBiLTNkYzI4MGFmYjU5MCIsImMiOjh9 (2025).
9.
World Health Organization. WHO guidelines for malaria (MAGICapp). https://app.magicapp.org/#/guideline/LwRMXj (2025).
10.
Sinka, M. E. et al. Modelling the relative abundance of the primary african vectors of malaria before and after the implementation of indoor, insecticide-based vector control. Malaria Journal 15, (2016).
11.
Sinka, M. E. et al. A global map of dominant malaria vectors. Parasites & vectors 5, 69 (2012).
12.
Sherrard-Smith, E. et al. Systematic review of indoor residual spray efficacy and effectiveness against plasmodium falciparum in africa. Nature Communications 9, 4982 (2018).
13.
Sherrard-Smith, E. et al. Optimising the deployment of vector control tools against malaria: A data-informed modelling study. The Lancet Planetary Health 6, e100–e109 (2022).
14.
Alliance for malaria prevention.
15.
Bertozzi-Villa, A. et al. Maps and metrics of insecticide-treated net access, use, and nets-per-capita in africa from 2000-2020. Nature Communications 12, 1–12 (2021).
16.
GADM maps and data.
17.
USAID. The DHS program.
18.
Access SMC.
19.
SMC alliance.
20.
United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF) Supply Division. Immunization market dashboard. https://www.unicef.org/supply/immunization-market-dashboard (2026).
